ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Measured value of the parameter */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Type of parameter measured (e.g., NH4 for Ammonium) */,
  "censored" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is censored */,
  "censor_type" TEXT /* Type of censoring applied to the data */,
  "quality_control" INTEGER /* Quality control level for the measurement */,
  "council_site_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the council's site */,
  "lawa_site_id" TEXT /* Identifier for LAWA's site */,
  "nz_reach" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reach */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the site is located */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use classification of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "catchment" TEXT /* Catchment area of the site */,
  "land_cover" TEXT /* Land cover type of the site */,
  "altitude_class" TEXT /* Classification of altitude */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the measurement */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for collecting the measurement */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which measurements are taken */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_index" REAL /* Index indicating the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_land_use FOREIGN KEY ("land_use") REFERENCES land_uses ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_altitude_class FOREIGN KEY ("altitude_class") REFERENCES altitude_classes ("altitude_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_land_cover FOREIGN KEY ("land_cover") REFERENCES land_covers ("land_cover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_catchment FOREIGN KEY ("catchment") REFERENCES catchments ("catchment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter FOREIGN KEY ("parameter") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., river, lake, ocean) */,
  "water_body" TEXT /* Name of the water body where the site is located */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "parameter_group" TEXT /* Group to which the parameter belongs (e.g., physical, chemical, biological) */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region (e.g., ISO 3166-2) */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., government, private, non-profit) */,
  "agency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_uses" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "land_use_name" TEXT /* Name of the land use type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use type */,
  "land_use_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the land use (e.g., ISO 19144-2) */,
  "land_use_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the catchment area covered by the land use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_covers" (
  "land_cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land cover type */,
  "land_cover_name" TEXT /* Name of the land cover type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land cover type */,
  "land_cover_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the land cover (e.g., ISO 19144-2) */,
  "land_cover_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the catchment area covered by the land cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_cover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "altitude_classes" (
  "altitude_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each altitude class */,
  "altitude_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the altitude class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the altitude class */,
  "altitude_class_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the altitude class (e.g., ISO 19144-2) */,
  "altitude_class_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the altitude class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("altitude_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catchments" (
  "catchment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catchment */,
  "catchment_name" TEXT /* Name of the catchment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catchment */,
  "catchment_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the catchment (e.g., ISO 19144-2) */,
  "catchment_area" REAL /* Area of the catchment in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catchment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry operator, scientist, compliance officer) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
